name: vend88-dashboard-workspace
description: VEND88 mobile app + FastAPI backend workspace

scripts.eas:preview: cd mobile && npx --yes eas-cli build -p android --profile preview
scripts.eas:production: cd mobile && npx --yes eas-cli build -p android --profile production
scripts.eas:update: cd mobile && npx --yes eas-cli update --branch production
